What We Offer

Gulf Adventures

Seven ways to experience the Arabian Gulf — every activity available across our tour packages.

⛵
Boating
Cruise the Gulf on our ocean boat — smooth, powerful, and built for adventure.
🎣
Fishing
Cast your line between the islands. Gear provided, no experience needed.
🏊
Swimming
Dive into crystal-clear Gulf waters from the boat or on a private island beach.
🍌
Banana Boat
Hold tight — bounce across the waves on an inflatable banana ride.
🐬
Dolphin Watching
Spot wild dolphins in their natural habitat around Abu Dhabi's islands.
🍩
Donut Ride
Spin and splash on an inflatable donut — pure adrenaline for all ages.
🚣
Kayaking
Paddle peacefully through calm island waters at your own pace.
🍖
Island BBQ
Grill on a private beach — fresh catch or chef-prepared meats under the open sky.
Tour Packages

Choose Your Escape

Five packages built for every type of Gulf adventurer. Book your preferred hours and get a bonus free hour on selected packages.

🏝️
Island Adventure Package
Most Popular · 5–7 Passengers
AED 1,499 /group
The ultimate Gulf day out. Fish between the islands, swim in turquoise waters, enjoy a beachside BBQ, and cruise past Abu Dhabi's iconic skyline on a City Tour — all in one unforgettable trip.
🎣 Island Fishing 🏊 Swimming 🍖 BBQ 🏙️ Abu Dhabi City Tour
⏱ 5 Hours + 1 Hour Free · Book 5, get 6
⚓
Boat Pick-Up & Drop
Quick Transfer
AED 399 /trip
We collect you by boat from your location and drop you at the marina or any coastal destination. Fast, scenic, stress-free.
🚤 Boat Transfer 📍 Any Location
⚡ On Demand
🧭
Pick-Up & Drop with Captain
Dedicated Charter
AED 799 /group
A dedicated boat and captain at your service. Fully flexible — go wherever you like on the Gulf for 4 hours, with the 5th hour on us.
👨‍✈️ Dedicated Captain 🗺️ Your Route
⏱ 4 Hours + 1 Hour Free
🍌
Island Activities Package
Family Fun · 5–7 Pax
AED 999 /group
Boat pick-up and a full island activity day — Banana Boat, Donut ride, Kayaking, and a beachside BBQ. 4 hours with 1 bonus hour free.
🍌 Banana Boat 🍩 Donut 🚣 Kayak 🍖 BBQ
⏱ 4 Hours + 1 Hour Free
🏊
Swimming Tour
Quick Dip · With Refreshments
AED 399 /group
A refreshing Gulf swim with complimentary water and fresh juice on board. Book 1 hour and get a second hour completely free.
🌊 Gulf Swimming 💧 Water & Juice
⏱ 1 Hour + 1 Hour Free
